messages.author: swarm
messages.text:
What it is: ACT — MANDATORY WIRING SLICE: close the loop on the one safe knob — the coordinator's promotion path applies an effective cap = min(configured, recommended), auto-throttling intake on a rework diagnosis and restoring on recovery, logging every change
What it solves: THIS IS THE EPIC'S MANDATORY WIRING SLICE (engineering article). BL-430 (observe) and BL-431 (diagnose)
can BOTH land, fully green, while the coordinator still promotes at full depth into a pipeline BL-431
has just diagnosed as thrashing — observe + diagnose with no act is a report, not a loop. Do …
How it works: A degraded rework diagnosis lowers the effective active-depth cap to one

messages.author: swarm
messages.text: BL-432 - ACT — MANDATORY WIRING SLICE: close the loop on the one safe knob — the coordinator's promotion path applies an effective cap = min(configured, recommended), auto-throttling intake on a rework diagnosis and restoring on recovery, logging every change is complete.
